resources.string: Broadcasts your location to your approved contacts
\"%1$s\" is requesting access to their settings. Allow?
Alert when contacts receive proximity or geofence notifications for you.
Look up addresses for history, map pins and geofences via system geocoding.
Require supervisor approval to access settings
Adjust how often your location is broadcasted
Control how often your location is updated based on your activity. Frequent updates use more battery.
Only show points that are at least this far from the previous one.
Don\'t broadcast or record your own fixes with an accuracy radius larger than this. SOS is never skipped.
Hide history points with an accuracy radius larger than this. Nothing is deleted.
Enabled - refines your movement type (walking, driving) in history
Off - allow physical activity access for more accurate movement labels
Unrestricted - LocaPeer can run freely in the background
Optimized - tap to set Unrestricted in system settings
Review and fix app access to location, camera and more
LocaPeer needs these permissions to share your location, scan invites and keep running in the background. Tap any that aren\'t granted to fix them.
Granted - your location can be shared
Not granted - tap to allow location access
Granted - location keeps sharing when the app is closed
Not granted - tap to allow all-the-time access in settings
Granted - used to scan invite QR codes
Not granted - tap to allow the camera
Granted - alerts and status updates can be shown
Not granted - tap to allow notifications
How long to keep contacts\' location data locally
How long to keep received messages locally
Save your private key and contacts to a file. Keep this file secure!
Restore from a previously exported file
Others can scan this to start tracking you.
Keep this safe. Anyone with this key can impersonate you.
All stored location pings will be permanently deleted.
All stored messages will be permanently deleted.
This backup is encrypted. Please enter the password to continue.
Optionally set a password to encrypt your backup file.
Choose a peer who will act as supervisor. They must approve access to settings from their device.
No peers found. Add a peer first by scanning their invite QR code.
Settings will be accessible without supervisor approval.
Scan a QR code to connect with someone and start sharing locations.
Remove %1$s from your contacts? Their location history will also be deleted locally.
This will remove you from %1$s\'s contacts and delete all your messages and location data from their device. You will also lose access to their location.
This will delete all messages you sent from %1$s\'s device. This cannot be undone.
This will delete all location data you have shared from %1$s\'s device. This cannot be undone.

plurals.name: contacts_bulk_remove_body
plurals.item: Remove this contact? Their location history will also be deleted locally.
Remove %1$d contacts? Their location history will also be deleted locally.

plurals.name: contacts_bulk_delete_messages_body
plurals.item: Remote delete all messages you sent from this contact\'s device? This cannot be undone.
Remote delete all messages you sent from %1$d contacts\' devices? This cannot be undone.

plurals.name: contacts_bulk_delete_locations_body
plurals.item: Remote delete all location history you shared from this contact\'s device? This cannot be undone.
Remote delete all location history you shared from %1$d contacts\' devices? This cannot be undone.

resources.string: Paste your 64-character hex private key to restore your identity and contacts.
Private location sharing with contacts.\nNo accounts. No proprietary servers.
Uses open Nostr relays as a secure transport - your data stays encrypted and private
Your full location history stays on your device. Only your current position is shared with selected contacts
What should your contacts call you?
Your private key is generated locally and never leaves this device.
Your identity is a private key stored only on this device. There is no account and no password reset - if you lose this phone without a backup, your identity and contacts are gone for good.
Anyone with this key can impersonate you and read your messages. Store it somewhere private - a password manager, not a screenshot.
I\'ve saved my private key somewhere safe
You can export an encrypted backup any time in Settings → Backup & Keys.

LocaPeer needs location access to share your position, camera access to scan invite codes, and notification access for background status. Physical activity access is optional - it helps label your movement (walking, driving) more accurately.
You\'ll see a few system prompts next:
• Location - required, to share your position.
• Physical activity - optional. It lets LocaPeer tell walking, driving and standing still apart more accurately. You can skip it and enable it later in Settings.
To keep your contacts updated while the app is closed, please select \'Allow all the time\' in the next screen.
Background location is required to update your contacts when the app is closed. Please try again and select \'Allow all the time\'.
Android may stop LocaPeer to save battery. To ensure reliable updates, please exclude LocaPeer from optimizations.
Your private location network is ready.
Camera permission is needed to scan QR codes.
This will connect you with %1$s and start sharing your location with each other.
A request has been sent to %1$s. You\'ll be connected once they accept.
Let someone scan this to follow your location
Your location will be encrypted specifically for the scanner\'s device.
Grant camera permission to scan a QR code.
Point camera at a LocaPeer QR
You\'ll be connected with %1$s once they accept.
Add them to your contacts and share location?
%1$s wants to update how you share. Review the settings below.
%1$s added you as a contact! You can now choose what to share back.
They will be able to see where you are
You will be able to see where they are
You are not sharing your location with %1$s
You don\'t have access to %1$s\'s location
Temporarily stop sending your location to %1$s
Receive your emergency alerts even if sharing is paused
Notify me if %1$s stops reporting their location
Set up arrival and departure zones for %1$s
You receive and approve unlock requests from %1$s
Allow %1$s to send you supervised-mode unlock requests
View movement history and map report for %1$s
How long %1$s keeps your location history
How long %1$s keeps messages you sent
Share for a limited time, then auto-stop.
Require biometric or device PIN to open LocaPeer
Authenticate to view your locations and messages.
App lock requires a host that supports the system prompt. Update the app.
Removes conversation from your device only.
Deletes conversation locally and from your contact.
Deletes the conversation locally and triggers a deletion request on the contacts device for the conversation.
Archive chats to keep your inbox clean
Open the map and tap a person\nto start a conversation
How do you want to delete this conversation with %1$s?
No contacts yet. Scan a QR code to add a contact.
You have blocked messages from %1$s. Go to Contacts to unblock.
How do you want to delete this message?
Deletes the chat from the contact’s device.
Removes the chat locally and automatically deletes it from the contact’s device.
This will broadcast your location every 15 seconds to your designated SOS contacts until deactivated.
This will stop the high-priority location broadcast to your emergency contacts.
Try selecting a different date or checking your connection.
There are no recorded pings for this day or time range.
Tap + to create a geofence area, then assign contacts to it from their sharing settings.

plurals.name: geo_delete_assigned
plurals.item: \"%1$s\" is assigned to %2$d contact. Deleting it removes those assignments too.
\"%1$s\" is assigned to %2$d contacts. Deleting it removes those assignments too.

resources.string: Tap + to assign a geofence area and choose whether to alert on arrival, departure, or both.
Create a geofence area first from the Geofences screen, then assign it here.
Tap or hold the map to place
Pinch to zoom • Hold or drag the pin to move
Alerts active at all times. Add a rule to restrict when alerts are sent.
Scan someone\'s invite QR from the Scan tab\nto start tracking their location
Get notified when a tracked person comes within a chosen distance of you.
Location is shared at all times. Add a rule to restrict when sharing is active.
Location is always shared with %1$s. Add a rule to restrict when.
Active when any rule matches the current time. Empty = always on.
Overnight: active from %1$s until %2$s next day
Supervisor approval is required to access settings.
Request timed out. Supervisor did not respond.
Choose which tabs appear in the bottom bar and their order. Map is always included.
Private location sharing with people you trust. No accounts, no cloud, no tracking by us.
%1$s wants you to be their supervisor
Accept to allow unlock approval requests from this device
Accept to allow %1$s to send you unlock approval requests when supervised mode is active.
Your supervisor confirmed - supervised mode is now set up
Your supervisor declined the request - supervised mode has been disabled
%1$s received a proximity alert about you
%1$s received an alert that you entered/exited fence: %2$s
%1$s wants to update how you share locations.
%1$s added you as a contact and wants to connect.
%1$s has declined your location sharing request.
Broadcasting emergency alert to SOS contacts
No app can open this file
Add contacts first, then group them into a circle.
Create a circle to message a group of contacts and share your location with all of them at once.
Only the circle\'s owner can rename it or change its members.
Delete \"%1$s\" and its group conversation? This only removes it from your device.
Leave \"%1$s\"? The owner is notified and removes you from the circle.
Leave and delete on this device
Removes the circle and its messages from this device. Messages you sent stay on other members\' devices.
Also deletes the messages you sent from the other members\' devices.
Remote delete command for ALL locations sent to %1$s
Remote delete command for ALL messages sent to %1$s
Invalid key - must be 64 hex characters.
Invalid private key - out of curve range.
